mapper.sql: template_id, config_type, provider_code, operation, http_method, url_template, headers_json, body_type, body_template, response_type, response_mapping, auth_type, auth_config_json, timeout, retry_times, is_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_provider_api_template ( config_type, provider_code, operation, http_method, url_template, headers_json, body_type, body_template, response_type, response_mapping, auth_type, auth_config_json, timeout, retry_times, is_enabled, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.configType}, #{item.providerCode}, #{item.operation}, #{item.httpMethod}, #{item.urlTemplate}, #{item.headersJson}, #{item.bodyType}, #{item.bodyTemplate}, #{item.responseType}, #{item.responseMapping}, #{item.authType}, #{item.authConfigJson}, #{item.timeout}, #{item.retryTimes}, #{item.isEnabled}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_provider_api_template SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
